optionA.text: Prostomium anteriorly produced into a low collar or tentacular crown
Prostomium forming a low collar, ventrally deeply incised

optionB.text: Prostomium forming a tentacular crown, ventrally entire
Prostomium deeply bilobed with paired palps

optionA.text: First two or three setigers with notosetae only

optionB.text: Only first setiger with notosetae only
